label: sandbox_diagnostics • inline-code hint wins when both inline-code and quote signatures fire
notes: A `python3 -c` script whose quote broke surfaces BOTH an interpreter inline-code flag and an unexpected-EOF quote signature. The more actionable fix (write the script to a file) must win, so the hint names sandbox_write_file and must NOT be the generic unbalanced-quote message.

sandboxDiagnostics.stderr: bash: -c: line 2: unexpected EOF while looking for matching `"'
